历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8308 → 8199 → 7122 → 17386 → 15472. In 2024, Guizhou implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category), and the ranking significantly dropped from 7122 in 2023 (Science) to 17386, then rebounded to 15472 in 2025, with a recent two-year baseline of about 15472. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 163 in 2021, 164 in 2022, 167 in 2023, 168 in 2024, and 176 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 224, an increase of 48 (+27.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 49th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a steady upward trend in recent years (51st in 2021 → 49th in 2026), indicating continuously enhanced comprehensive strength. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 94/106), with low exposure on short video platforms and no obvious signal of application heat. Historical admission anomalies are low attention, with no signs of gaps. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for the university's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering. Civil Engineering and Architecture have significantly declining social popularity, but the university's Civil Engineering is an A-level discipline, leading to divergent application heat. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 299,000, a slight increase from 297,258 in 2025. Based on historical proportions, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 70%, i.e., about 209,300, slightly expanding the competition base. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference and high attractiveness to provincial candidates. The university's enrollment in Guizhou accounts for a small but increasing proportion, with Physics Category plans of 176 in 2025 and 224 in 2026, a significant expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15472, the significant 27.3% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (easing competition), a slight increase in total provincial candidates, a steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and strong attractiveness of advantageous disciplines, and taking into account the intensified competition due to the slight increase in total candidates and the university's ranking improvement, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 18300, with a range of 17800–18800.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 17000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Transportation. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 18800) are advised to primarily choose Tier 2 majors and safely secure Tier 3 majors.
